overall.description: First-person horseback riding at night through a rural countryside, illuminated by a handheld torch. The rider travels along a dirt path bordered by stone walls before galloping into open grasslands. Game engine footage with cinematic lighting and atmospheric night rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road with stone walls

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at night along a dirt path, holding a torch to illuminate the stone walls and trail ahead

entered.detail: rough stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side
unpaved dirt trail winding through the countryside
distant wooden building or barn visible on the right horizon
abandoned wooden wagon with wheels sitting beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective of riding a horse along a narrow dirt trail at night. A stone wall runs along the left side while open grassland lies to the right. The path is illuminated by a torch held in the left hand, revealing an abandoned wooden cart near the wall as the horse proceeds forward.

events.description: horse leaves the dirt path and enters open grassland, turning away from the walled road

agents.ego_description: galloping through open grassland, having left the established trail to cross the field

entered.detail: expansive open field of tall grass stretching to the horizon
dark silhouette of trees marking the horizon against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The horse leaves the confines of the dirt road and enters a wide-open grassland. The stone walls and path fall behind as the rider gallops across the field, with only the distant tree line visible against the dark night sky. The torch continues to illuminate the immediate foreground as the horse moves freely through the tall grass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a rider moves from a confined rural trail into the vast expanse of an open grassland at night. It begins along a narrow dirt path, where a handheld torch illuminates a stone wall to the left and an abandoned wooden cart as the horse proceeds forward. As the rider continues, the restrictive walls and trail fall away, and the scene opens up into a wide field of tall grass. The camera then shifts into a gallop, leaving the path behind to move freely across the dark landscape with only a distant tree line visible against the night sky.
